name: Debora Shoquist
formerRole: Executive Vice President, Operations at NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Debora Shoquist served as EVP of Operations at NVIDIA for over 15 years and was a direct report to Jensen Huang, overseeing global manufacturing and supply chain operations
sourceNote: Named in NVIDIA proxy filings and annual reports as executive officer reporting to CEO

name: David Shannon
currentRole: Executive Vice President and General Counsel, Lattice Semiconductor
formerRole: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary at NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: David Shannon served as EVP and General Counsel at NVIDIA, reporting directly to Jensen Huang, and was listed as an executive officer in NVIDIA SEC filings
sourceNote: Named in NVIDIA SEC filings as executive officer; subsequent role at Lattice Semiconductor publicly reported

name: Michael Hara
formerRole: Vice President, Investor Relations and Communications at NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Michael Hara led investor relations and communications at NVIDIA for many years, working closely with Jensen Huang on messaging to investors and media
sourceNote: Named in NVIDIA press releases and earnings call transcripts as VP of Investor Relations and Communications

name: Ajay Puri
currentRole: Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations at NVIDIA Corporation
formerRole: Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations at NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Ajay Puri served as EVP of Worldwide Field Operations at NVIDIA, a direct report to Jensen Huang responsible for global sales and go-to-market strategy
sourceNote: Listed in NVIDIA SEC proxy statements as executive officer reporting to CEO Jensen Huang

name: Chris Malachowsky
formerRole: Co-Founder and Vice President of Hardware Engineering at NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Chris Malachowsky is one of NVIDIA's three co-founders alongside Jensen Huang, having worked in senior engineering leadership before transitioning to a Fellow role; long-tenured peer and collaborator of Jensen Huang
sourceNote: Co-founder of NVIDIA, publicly documented in company history and SEC filings
